mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT dept_cd, dept_nm, dept_parent_cd, join_date, retire_date, use_yn FROM zzz_dept_info WHERE dept_cd = #{deptCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, d.dept_parent_cd, d.join_date, d.retire_date, d.use_yn FROM zzz_dept_info d INNER JOIN dept_tree dh ON d.dept_parent_cd = dh.dept_cd WHERE d.use_yn = 'Y' ) select a.dept_cd ,a.dept_nm ,a.join_date ,a.retire_date ,a.use_yn from dept_tree a
